name: ⚡ Medium Challenge
description: Balanced babysitter session. ~30-60 min intervals, 50% potty success, progression enabled. A realistic daily trainer.

customMicroEvents.label: Check-In Leak
customMicroEvents.flow: A babysitter check makes you tense up, and that tension squeezes out a leak.

customMicroEvents.label: Hurry Wobble
customMicroEvents.flow: You try to move fast, lose rhythm, and dribble before you recover.

customMicroEvents.label: Denied Potty Dribble
customMicroEvents.flow: The moment you hear 'not yet,' a protesting leak slips out.

customFullEvents.label: Hallway Accident
customFullEvents.flow: You almost make it, then the last few steps trigger a full loss of control.

customFullEvents.label: Diaper Flood
customFullEvents.flow: A small failure snowballs into a full wetting before help arrives.
